childhood.familyBackground: Syrian family with modest background. Father was businessman, mother was homemaker. Faced early hardship and displacement.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 소박한 배경의 시리아 가족. 아버지는 사업가, 어머니는 가정주부였음. 조기 어려움과 강제 이주 직면.
childhood.education: Technical training and business education in France
childhood.earlyLife: Immigrated to Europe, worked various manual jobs. Determined and resilient, eventually built business through technical innovation and hard work.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 유럽으로 이민가 다양한 육체 노동에 종사. 결연하고 회복력 있어 결국 기술 혁신과 열심히 일함으로 사업 구축.

careerTimeline.event: Started scaffolding and construction materials company in France
careerTimeline.eventKo: 프랑스에서 비계 및 건설 자재 회사 시작

careerTimeline.event: Built major European construction and engineering enterprise
careerTimeline.eventKo: 주요 유럽 건설 및 엔지니어링 기업 구축

careerTimeline.event: Expanded internationally with technology-driven construction solutions
careerTimeline.eventKo: 기술 중심 건설 솔루션으로 국제 확대

personalTraits.knownFor: Self-made entrepreneur who overcame hardship to build major construction and engineering company. Known for technical innovation and persistent determination.
personalTraits.knownForKo: 어려움을 극복하고 주요 건설 및 엔지니어링 회사를 구축한 자수성가 기업가. 기술 혁신 및 지속적인 결단력으로 알려짐.
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports education and humanitarian causes, particularly for displaced persons
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 특히 난민에 대한 교육 및 인도주의 활동 지원
